context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the quality instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run the following tools and address all violations:

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write characterization test documenting current behavior.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify PASSES** — `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs`.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify PASSES** — Run characterization test again.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Regression Check** — `mix test` for full suite.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: mix test   # All tests must pass before proceeding to Phase 3

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Produce a `# Quality Report — [Date]` with three sections:

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Conventions Check**: list CRITICAL / WARNING / SUGGESTION violations with file path, line, and description.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Credo violations after refactoring:** Run `mix format` for auto-fixable issues, then fix remaining manually with `mix credo --strict`.
